regression_cases.input: Run a normal operational case for analytical-methodology: process a bounded project problem and produce traceable output.
regression_cases.evidence: Evidence note is present, uncertainty is stated, and exportable trace behavior is required.
regression_cases.claim_boundary: Regression case verifies local proof behavior and claim discipline only; it does not establish production readiness or external validation.
regression_cases.remaining_gate: Needs repeated non-sample runs, browser screenshot evidence, reviewer validation, and deployment hardening before full operational standing.

regression_cases.input: Run a harder case for analytical-methodology: include ambiguity, possible source weakness, and a decision that should not be over-promoted.
regression_cases.evidence: Challenge requires uncertainty handling and a next-evidence statement before stronger claims.
regression_cases.claim_boundary: Regression case verifies local proof behavior and claim discipline only; it does not establish production readiness or external validation.
regression_cases.remaining_gate: Needs repeated non-sample runs, browser screenshot evidence, reviewer validation, and deployment hardening before full operational standing.
